title: Mustard Virus
description: The Mustard Virus has gone global and wiped out humanity. You're all that remains, well - you and the endless waves of infected. How long can you last? Will your base be strong enough to stop the horde?
body:
# Mustard Virus by Forge Labs ![Forge Labs Divider](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f83f327701a64468e9152ecf2450c0ef1be54a3f.png)
The Mustard Virus has gone global and wiped out humanity. You're all that remains, well - you and the endless waves of infected. How long can you last? Will your base be strong enough to stop the horde?

The infected are relentless. They're attracted to light, sound, and most of all - players. Sunlight no longer has any effect on them, and they'll stop at nothing to get to you!
![Forge Labs Divider](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f83f327701a64468e9152ecf2450c0ef1be54a3f.png) ![Forge Labs Divider](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f83f327701a64468e9152ecf2450c0ef1be54a3f.png)
### Notice For the Shaders / Resource Packs feature you will have to manually install [OptiFine](https://optifine.net/downloads) for 1.12.2
![Forge Labs Divider](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f83f327701a64468e9152ecf2450c0ef1be54a3f.png)

### 🔧 Hosting Huge Thanks to Bisect Hosting for providing me with a server to host this in the video! Get your own server and use the code "ForgeLabs" at checkout!


![Forge Labs Divider](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f83f327701a64468e9152ecf2450c0ef1be54a3f.png)
中文翻译 (Chinese Translation) # 芥末病毒》由 Forge Labs 制作 ![Forge Labs Divider](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f83f327701a64468e9152ecf2450c0ef1be54a3f.png)
芥末病毒席卷全球，毁灭了人类。现在只剩下你和无穷无尽的感染者。你们还能坚持多久？你们的基地是否足够强大，能够阻止病毒的肆虐？

感染者是无情的。它们会被光线、声音以及最重要的--玩家所吸引。阳光对它们不再有任何影响，它们会不惜一切代价接近你！
![Forge Labs Divider](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f83f327701a64468e9152ecf2450c0ef1be54a3f.png) ![Forge Labs Divider](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f83f327701a64468e9152ecf2450c0ef1be54a3f.png)
### 通知 对于着色器/资源包功能，您需要手动安装 [OptiFine](https://optifine.net/downloads) 对于 1.12.2
